---
title: "P.10 Piecewise 1D heat conduction with parameterized conductivity and source"
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
---

![](images/P10_banner.jpg){fig-align="center" width="80%"}

## Problem Setup
<img
  src="https://github.githubassets.com/images/modules/logos_page/GitHub-Mark.png"
  alt="GitHub logo"
  width="32"
  height="32"
  style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:8px;"
/>[Link](https://github.com/suparnob100/scikit-rom/tree/main/examples/heat_transfer/dynamic/problem_transient_heat_2d)

![](examples_docs/P10.pdf){width="85%" height="1000px"}
